title: urocarpidium mathewsii
intro: Urocarpidium mathewsii, also known as the Mexican plum or Urocarp, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Urocarpidium mathewsii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
